name: Couscous
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 to 3 pound cut-up broiler fryer chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven until hot.
2. Cook chicken in the oil over medium heat for about 15 minutes or until brown on all sides.
3. Drain fat from the Dutch oven.
4. Add water, coriander, salt, bouillon granules, red pepper, turmeric, carrots, onions, turnips, and garlic to the chicken in the Dutch oven.
5. Bring mixture to a boil; reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
7. Add zucchini to the chicken mixture. Cover and simmer about 10 minutes or until the thickest pieces of chicken are done and vegetables are tender.
8. Add beans. Heat for 5 minutes; keep warm.
9. Prepare Couscous. Mound on center of heated platter. Arrange chicken and vegetables around couscous.
6 servings.
